text_original: Great story telling, you can even play as an anime/movie charrecter and retell the story playing as the main character or any character this game is awesome
text_zh: 出色的剧情叙述，你甚至可以扮演动漫或电影角色，以主角或任何角色的身份重温故事，这款游戏太棒了。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is so cool to hear you are using Fantasia to step into the shoes of your favorite anime and movie characters to retell their stories. Your creativity is what makes this app truly awesome! We will keep working hard to fuel your imagination. Thanks for being part of our journey!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您正在使用 Fantasia 化身为心爱的动漫和电影角色并重写他们的故事，这简直太酷了。您的创意才是让这款应用真正出彩的原因！我们会继续努力，为您提供源源不断的想象动力。感谢您成为我们旅程的一员！
